WelcomeText.0:
Welcome to <color=#ff351f><size=120%>TheOtherUs-Edited</size></color>!

Commands (a space is required after the command):
/r [Role Name] : Get a description of the specified role  
/m : Use in-game to view the description of your current role

To view other commands, type: /cmd
WelcomeText.13:
欢迎游玩<color=#ff351f><size=120%>我们的超多职业</size></color> ！

游戏指令 :
/ls : 获取全部玩家的代号（PlayerId）
/r [职业名称] ：获取该职业的介绍
/m ：游戏内使用，获取自己已有职业的介绍

如需查看其它指令请输入：/cmd

CommandsInHost.0:
Host Commands:

/end: Force-end the game
/mt: Call/End an emergency meeting
/list: Get a list of the playerId of all players
/kill [player]:  Force-kill the target player
/exile [player]: End the meeting and exiled target player
/revive [player]: Force-revive the target player
/say [text]: Broadcast message to all players as host
/room [num]: Change the max number of players of the room
/ct [player]: Clear the target player's tasks
/cv: Reset the meeting voting Status
CommandsInHost.13:
指令列表：

/end ：强制游戏结束
/mt: 召集/结束会议
/ls : 获取全部玩家的ID
/kill [玩家] ：强制击杀玩家
/exile [玩家] ：结束会议并驱逐目标
/revive [玩家] ： 强制复活玩家
/say [内容] : 向所有玩家发送房主消息
/room [数量] : 修改房间最大人数
/ct [玩家] : 清除对方的任务
/cv ：清除当前会议中的投票状态

CommandsInPlayer.0:
Players can use either the target's player ID or nickname when using commands.

Global Commands:
/ls Get the nicknames of all players
/r [role name] Get the role description for the specified role

In-game Commands:
/m Get the role descriptions of all roles the current player has

Dead Players or Lobby Commands:
/tp [player] Teleport to the target player
CommandsInPlayer.13:
使用的指令允许使用对方的玩家ID或玩家昵称作为指令目标。

全局指令：
/ls : 获取全部玩家的ID
/r [职业名称] ：获得该职业的职业介绍

游戏中指令：
/m  ： 获得当前玩家所有职业的职业介绍

死亡玩家或游戏大厅指令：
/tp [玩家] ：将自己传送到该玩家的位置。

LastImpostorIntroDesc.0: You’re the last wolf and the last hope…

LastImpostorShortDesc.0: Your kill CD is greatly reduced.
LastImpostorShortDesc.13: 你的击杀冷却会大幅度减少

BloodyIntroDesc.0: Bear the curse of my blood!

BloodyShortDesc.0: Leave a bloody message upon death.
BloodyShortDesc.13: 用你的血留下死亡信息

AntiTeleportIntroDesc.0: Stay at your position during and after meetings.

AntiTeleportShortDesc.0: Stay at your position during and after meetings.

TieBreakerIntroDesc.0: Rules are made to be broken.
TieBreakerIntroDesc.13: 你说得对...但是，规则就是用来打破的

BaitIntroDesc.0: Big prize or small prize; all's good as long as you don't forget.
BaitIntroDesc.13: 大奖小奖，能记住就是好奖

BaitShortDesc.13: 击杀你的人会立即报警

AftermathShortDesc.0: Your killer forcibly uses their special ability.
AftermathShortDesc.13: 被击杀时杀手会被动使用一次技能

SunglassesIntroDesc.0: So cool... but now you can't see.

TorchIntroDesc.0: Light in the heart, illuminate the dark.

TorchShortDesc.0: You have increased vision, unaffected by lights-out.

FlashShortDesc.13: 你拥有更快的移动速度!

MultitaskerIntroDesc.0: Maybe people can't multitask—but you can.
MultitaskerIntroDesc.13: 虽然人不可以三心二意，但是你可以一心二用

GiantShortDesc.0: You have a larger build and slower movement speed.
GiantShortDesc.13: 你拥有更大的体型和较慢的移动速度

MiniIntroDesc.0: Article 127 of the Child Protection Act
MiniIntroDesc.13: 《未成年人保护法》第127条[不，是第133条]

MiniShortDesc.0: No one can harm you before you grow up.
MiniShortDesc.13: 长大之前没有人能伤害你

VipIntroDesc.0: I have an announcement to make.

VipShortDesc.13: 所有人都知道你的死讯

IndomitableIntroDesc.0: Fearless and ever more resilient in battle.

SluethShortDesc.0: Reporting a body reveals the victim's role.
SluethShortDesc.13: 报告尸体可知晓死者职业

CursedShortDesc.0: If killed by an impostor, you survive and join their team.
CursedShortDesc.13: 被内鬼击杀会加入内鬼阵营

InvertIntroDesc.0: One last drink before closing time.

InvertShortDesc.13: 你的移动方向被颠倒了

BlindIntroDesc.0: The outside world is so scary...

WatcherIntroDesc.0: Let's see how you all vote.
WatcherIntroDesc.13: 我看看你们怎么投票的啊

WatcherShortDesc.13: 你可以知晓所有人的投票情况

RadarShortDesc.0: An arrow always points to the nearest player.
RadarShortDesc.13: 得知距离最近的玩家位置

TunnelerIntroDesc.0: Let me take a look at this vent.

TunnelerShortDesc.0: You can use vents after completing tasks.

ButtonBarryIntroDesc.0: You can call an emergency meeting anytime!
ButtonBarryIntroDesc.13: 你可以随时召开紧急会议!

ButtonBarryShortDesc.0: You can call an emergency meeting anytime!
ButtonBarryShortDesc.13: 你可以随时召开紧急会议!

ChameleonIntroDesc.0: Now you see me; soon you won't.
ChameleonIntroDesc.13: 看不见我~ 看不见我~

ChameleonShortDesc.0: You become invisible when standing still.

ShifterIntroDesc.0: Hippity hoppity, your ability is now my property.
ShifterIntroDesc.13: 你的能力真好用！马上就是我的了！

GhostEngineerIntroDesc.0: Make up for the regret and help fix the ship after your death.
GhostEngineerIntroDesc.13: 弥补生前未能修好飞船的遗憾

GhostEngineerShortDesc.0: Make up for the regret and help fix the ship after your death.
GhostEngineerShortDesc.13: 弥补生前未能修好飞船的遗憾

SpecterIntroDesc.0: I'm not ready to die yet!

SpecterShortDesc.0: I'm not ready to die yet!

InfectedIntroDesc.13: 生 化 危 机

InfectedShortDesc.0: Infect, convert and kill the other players to win.
InfectedShortDesc.13: 感染并击杀其他玩家获得胜利

MarionetteShortDesc.13: 放置木偶，并可以随时交换位置

ProfessionalShortDesc.13: 击杀玩家时会隐藏尸体

OracleIntroDesc.13: 请问您今天要来点赎罪券吗？

OracleShortDesc.13: 招募信徒，在会议时保护他并获得信息

SoulSightShortDesc.13: 以自杀的状态进入会议得分

ImpostorFullDesc.0: An ordinary Imposter, deadly but otherwise unassuming.

WolfLordFullDesc.0:
May reveal their identity during meetings to gain the ability to forcibly kill one player during that meeting. Cannot be guessed by others.
If the Alpha Wolf uses the Assassin ability, they cannot reveal identity that round.
(Force-kill and Assassin abilities are mutually exclusive in one meeting.)
WolfLordFullDesc.13:
在会议中可以揭示身份，获得一次在会议中击杀玩家的机会。且无法被猜测
同时，如果狼之主使用赌怪能力则本轮会议无法揭示身份。
（猎杀和赌怪一次会议只能用一个能力）

MorphlingFullDesc.0: Can disguise as other players after sampling them.
MorphlingFullDesc.13: 采样后可以伪装成其他人。

BomberFullDesc.0:
Can plant a bomb on another player, which activates after a few seconds.
The holder must pass it on before a meeting is called or the timer runs out, otherwise they die.
Depending on settings, the bomb may be passed back to the Demolitionist.
BomberFullDesc.13:
给其他人一个炸弹，炸弹将在几秒后激活。
拿到炸弹的玩家需要在一定时间内且进会议前将炸弹传递给他人，
否则自己死亡。
根据房间设置：炸弹可以传递回炸弹狂手中

PoucherFullDesc.0:
Learns the role of players they kill.

N.B.: Conflicts with Mortician as a main role; if added as a Modifier role, the main Mortician role will be disabled.
PoucherFullDesc.13:
可以得知被你击杀的玩家身份。

注：附加能力的入殓师与主职业的入殓师冲突，
当附加能力的入殓师开启时，自动禁用主职业的入殓师

ButcherFullDesc.0:
After killing a player, the Butcher can use the Dismember ability.
Several copies of the victim's body will appear in random locations after dismemberment.

N.B.: Dismember can only be used once per round, and each player sees the dismembered bodies in different spots. The original body remains at the location of the kill.
ButcherFullDesc.13:
击杀其他玩家后可以使用肢解技能。
肢解后会在其它位置出现数个该玩家的尸体。

注：该技能每回合只能使用一次，且每位玩家看到的被肢解尸体位置都不一致。
但肢解前的尸体仍会留在原地。

MimicFullDesc.0:
When the Mimic kill certain Crewmates, they can steal their role and gain their ability.

N.B.: A Guesser can guess the acquired role and kill the Mimic!
MimicFullDesc.13:
击杀部分船员时可以窃取他们的身份，获得他们的能力。

注：赌怪仍然可以猜测窃取后的身份！

CamouflagerFullDesc.0: Can activate Camo ability and turn all players into dark silhouettes.
CamouflagerFullDesc.13: 开启技能后所有人进入小黑人状态。

EraserFullDesc.0:
Erases a target's role, turning them into a regular Crewmate with no abilities.
The effect takes place after the next meeting.
EraserFullDesc.13: 可以抹去目标职业。使其变成白板船员，使用技能后需过一轮会议生效。

VampireFullDesc.0:
Vampire bite causes delayed death after a few seconds.

If the Vampire spawn rate is above 0%, everyone starts with one placeable Garlic.
While inside the Garlic's range, the Vampire cannot bite but can only kill directly.
VampireFullDesc.13:
被吸血的玩家在几秒后暴毙。

吸血鬼出现概率不为0%时会为所有玩家发放大蒜，
开局每人获得一个大蒜，在大蒜范围内，
吸血鬼只能直接出刀而不能吸血（延迟刀）。

CleanerFullDesc.0:
Can clean up corpses.
Cleaning a body resets kill CD.
CleanerFullDesc.13:
可以对尸体使用清理技能，清理后尸体会消失。
使用清理后击杀按钮也会同步进入冷却。

UndertakerFullDesc.0:
Can drag and relocate corpses.
Depending on settings, movement speed may be reduced while dragging.
UndertakerFullDesc.13: 可以对尸体进行移动，根据房间设置，移动速度可能更慢。

EscapistFullDesc.0:
Can mark a location and teleport back to it at any time.
The marked spot can be updated whenever you like.
EscapistFullDesc.13:
可以标记一个地点，随时可以使用传送技能回到标记点。
逃逸者可以随时标记新的标记点。

WarlockFullDesc.0:
Can curse a player.
When the cursed player is near someone, the Warlock can remotely kill the nearby player through them.
After using remote kill, the Warlock is unable to move for a short duration.
Warlock kills appear as sudden deaths without killing animations.
WarlockFullDesc.13:
术士对目标下咒后，
可以通过该目标对目标身边的人进行远程击杀，
使用术士技能击杀后一段时间内无法移动。
术士击杀，死者表现为原地死亡。

TricksterFullDesc.0:
Can place trickster boxes on the map. They activate after one meeting.
After placing three boxes, the Trickster can trigger a blackout that lasts for a while.
This blackout is not an emergency sabotage and cannot be fixed.
Trickster boxes function as vents.
TricksterFullDesc.13:
可以在地图上放置骗术盒，过一轮会议后生效。
放满三个盒子后可以熄灯一段时间，
此关灯状态不属于紧急任务，无法被修复。
骗术盒可以当做管道使用。

BountyHunterFullDesc.0:
Killing the assigned target grants a shorter kill cooldown.
Cannot benefit from the Last Imposter's kill CD reduction.
BountyHunterFullDesc.13:
赏金猎人通过击杀特定目标可以获得较短的击杀CD
无法被绝境者加成

TerroristFullDesc.0:
Bomb Mode: Place a large bomb on the ground. After a short delay, the bomb arms and enters a countdown.
During this time, players can attempt to defuse it by standing nearby for a while.
If not defused in time, all players in the blast radius will be killed—including Imposters and the Terrorist themselves.
The explosion zone gradually changes color from white to red before detonating.

Suicide Mode: Instantly detonate yourself, killing all nearby players—including yourself.
N.B.: Cannot kill protected players or Minis.
TerroristFullDesc.13:
爆破模式：在地上放置大型炸弹，一段时间后激活，
激活后会进入较长时间的爆炸倒计时，
倒计时期间玩家可以在炸弹附近进行拆弹，拆弹时需要一段时间，
如果倒计时结束则将范围内所有玩家击杀
（不分敌我，包括爆破手自己）。
炸弹激活后炸弹爆炸范围内的地面会出现范围提示
初始状态为白色，会逐渐变为红色直到爆炸。

自爆模式：使用技能时会直接爆炸，将范围内的玩家全部击杀，包括自己。
注：无法击杀被保护玩家以及小孩

BlackmailerFullDesc.0: Can blackmail a player outside of meetings, preventing them from speaking during the next meeting.
BlackmailerFullDesc.13: 会议外可以勒索一名玩家，使其会议时无法发言。

WitchFullDesc.0:
Can put hexes on a player, hexed players bear the mark of the Witch during the next meeting.
They will die after the meeting ends unless the Witch is voted out or dies.

If the setting "Voting The Witch Saves All The Targets" is off,
only being guessed correctly by Guessers will save the cursed play
WitchFullDesc.13:
拥有诅咒能力，被诅咒的人会议上会显示女巫标记，
会议结束后死亡（除非女巫被投或者死亡）

如果 "驱逐女巫可拯救被诅咒者" 选项为关时，
只有女巫被赌怪猜测而死才能拯救被诅咒玩家。

NinjaFullDesc.0:
Can mark a target and teleport to them for an instant kill.
After the kill, the Ninja gains temporary invisibility.
Both the kill location and the Ninja’s original position are marked by green leaves that fade after a while.
NinjaFullDesc.13:
忍者可以标记目标，
在这之后可以随时瞬移到目标旁边击杀目标。
击杀后会获得一段时间的隐身，
并且原地和被击杀的位置都会留下一圈绿色的叶子，
一段时间后叶子消失。

YoyoFullDesc.0:
Can mark a location and teleport to it using the ability.
After a set duration, you will automatically return to your original location.

You also have a portable Admin Table.
YoyoFullDesc.13:
可以标记一个位置，使用技能后会瞬移到标记点，
技能有持续时间，持续时间结束后将再瞬移回传送前的位置。

拥有随身管理地图。

EvilTrapperFullDesc.0:
Can place multiple traps. After a short time, each trap activates.
If a player steps too close, they become trapped.
If no one rescues them in time, they die.

To rescue: Another player must step on the trap.
Players in the area will hear an audible cue when someone dies from a trap.
EvilTrapperFullDesc.13:
能够放置多个陷阱，放置后，陷阱将在特定的时间后激活。
如果玩家离陷阱太近，玩家就会被陷阱卡住。
在一段时间后，如果没有人来营救被困玩家，他就会死亡。

（营救方式：其他玩家再次踩到陷阱即可）
特定范围内的每个人都会听到被困玩家被陷阱击杀的声音。

GamblerFullDesc.0:
Each kill causes the next kill CD to change randomly.
Cannot benefit from Last Imposter's kill CD reduction.
GamblerFullDesc.13:
每次击杀，下一次击杀冷却会随机变化。
注：赌徒无法获得绝境者

GrenadierFullDesc.0:
Can flash and blind nearby non-Impostor players. Affected players have their name tags turn black.
Depending on settings, buddy Imposters may also see who was flashed.
GrenadierFullDesc.13:
可以使用技能闪瞎附近的非红狼玩家，被闪到的玩家名称会变黑。
队友按照房间设置也可以得知哪些玩家被影响。

GunsmithFullDesc.0:
After your kill recharges, you can store a kill instead of using it. There is a limit to the number of bullets stored at once.
Quickdraw can retrieve stored bullets anytime, which instantly refreshes their kill.
GunsmithFullDesc.13:
可以在击杀冷却完毕后手动存下子弹，存入的子弹有上限。
随时可以取出子弹，取出子弹后会将击杀按钮重置冷却。

BerserkerFullDesc.0:
Enters rage mode upon killing. During rage, you can kill multiple times within a short window.

The rage duration starts at 0.1s and increases the longer it is charged after regular kill CD is refreshed.
BerserkerFullDesc.13:
狂战士在击杀时会狂暴，击杀玩家后可在极短时间内无限制多次击杀。

初始的持续时间为0.1s，在击杀冷却完毕后会开始蓄力，
蓄力时间越长，击杀持续时间越长。

SurvivorFullDesc.0:
Wins by surviving until the end of the game, joining the victory of another faction.
Depending on settings, may have bulletproof vest and/or a blank bullet abilities.
Invulnerable while the vest is active; attackers will enter a brief CD.
Blank bullets prevent the target's next kill from taking effect.
SurvivorFullDesc.13:
存活到游戏结束即可跟随其它阵营胜利
以房间设置为准，幸存者可能拥有防弹衣和空包弹技能。
防弹衣在开启期间，无法被击杀，杀手击杀时会进入较短的冷却。
空包弹可以让目标下一次无法正常击杀。

PartTimerFullDesc.0:
Need to choose another player to "work for" during the action phase and shares the same win condition as the selected employer.
If the employer dies while the Mercenary is still alive, another employer need to be selected.
If no player is chosen within a set time, the Mercenary dies from poverty.
If the Mercenary dies, the employer will no longer change, but a win is still possible if the employer is alive and wins.
PartTimerFullDesc.13:
打工仔可以在行动阶段选择一位玩家打工，胜利条件和打工对象一致。
若在打工仔存活时，打工对象死亡，打工仔可以寻找一名其他玩家打工。
若打工仔一段时间内没有选择玩家打工，打工仔会穷死。
打工仔死亡后，打工对象不会再发生变化，仍然可以跟随打工对象获胜。

AmnisiacFullDesc.0:
Knows the location of corpses.
By finding a player's corpse and using Recall, inherits that player's role.
AmnisiacFullDesc.13:
失忆者能知晓尸体的位置，
通过找到尸体并回忆获得尸体的职业。

JesterFullDesc.0: Wins by being voted out during a meeting.
JesterFullDesc.13: 在会议中被驱逐即可胜利

VultureFullDesc.0:
Knows the location of corpses.
Wins after devouring a certain number of them.
VultureFullDesc.13: 秃鹫知晓尸体位置，通过吞噬一定数量尸体后获得胜利。

LawyerFullDesc.0:
Assigned to help a Client achieve victory.
If the Client is voted out during a meeting, the Lawyer dies as well.
If the Client dies by other means, the Lawyer becomes a Pursuer.
LawyerFullDesc.13:
律师的任务是帮助客户赢得胜利。
会议上，客户被投时律师也会死亡。
其他情况下客户死亡，律师会变成起诉人。

ExecutionerFullDesc.0:
Wins if the target (always a Crewmate) is voted out during a meeting.
Becomes a Pursuer if the target dies by other means.
Depending on settings, may become a Lawyer if the target is recruited and no longer a Crewmate before being voted out.
ExecutionerFullDesc.13:
处刑对象在会议中被投出即可胜利。
处刑对象死亡，处刑者变为起诉人。
以房间设置为准，处刑目标在被招募时处刑者可能会变为律师

PursuerFullDesc.0:
Wins by surviving until the end of the game.
Can give blank bullets to other players, rendering their next kill attempt invalid if used on a killer role.
PursuerFullDesc.13:
起诉人的任务是活下去就算赢
起诉人可以给其他玩家塞空包弹，
空包弹可以给带刀职业的下一刀击杀无效。

JackalFullDesc.0:
Can kill and win by eliminating all other players.
Depending on settings, Jackals may recruit another player to become a Sidekick.
May also gain the ability to turn invisible.
JackalFullDesc.13:
豺狼具有击杀能力，胜利条件为杀死所有其他玩家。
根据房间设置，豺狼可以选择一名玩家，将其招募为跟班
豺狼还有概率获得隐身技能。

SidekickFullDesc.0:
Appears when a Jackal uses the Recruit ability on a player.
Joins the Jackal's team and shares the same win condition: eliminate all others.
Depending on settings, may become the new Jackal if the original Jackal dies and may gain the ability to recruit a new Sidekick.
SidekickFullDesc.13:
在豺狼对一名玩家使用招募技能时出现，
被招募的玩家变成跟班，加入豺狼阵营，
胜利条件变为杀死所有其他玩家。
根据房间设置，豺狼死亡时，跟班可能晋升为豺狼，
甚至可能进一步获得招募新的跟班的权利。

PavlovsownerFullDesc.0:
Can tame another player to become Pavlov's Dog and win by killing all other players.
Only one Dog may exist at once. After a Dog dies, Pavlov can tame another one, up to a set number of times (see settings).
If Pavlov dies, any surviving Dog goes berserk with reduced kill CD and suicide timer that refreshes on kills.
PavlovsownerFullDesc.13:
巴甫洛夫可以驯化其他玩家为巴甫洛夫的狗。
需要将所有其他玩家击杀才能胜利。
在一局游戏中，只能同时存在一条狗，
狗死亡后巴甫洛夫才能驯化下一位玩家。
驯化有次数限制，详见房间设置。

在巴甫洛夫死亡后，存活的狗有可能会获得狂化效果：
击杀CD大幅减少，并且会在一段时间内自杀。

PavlovsdogsFullDesc.0:
Appears when recruited by Pavlov (Owner). Must cooperate with Pavlov to eliminate all other players.
Depending on settings, may go berserk upon Pavlov's death with significantly reduced kill CD and a suicide timer that refreshes on kills.
PavlovsdogsFullDesc.13:
被巴甫洛夫招募而出现的职业，需要配合巴甫洛夫击杀所有玩家才能胜利。

根据房间设置：在巴甫洛夫死亡后，存活的狗有可能会获得狂化效果：
击杀CD大幅减少，并且会在一段时间内自杀。

SwooperFullDesc.0:
Has the abilities to kill and become invisible, and moves faster while invisible.
Wins by killing all other players.
SwooperFullDesc.13:
拥有隐形和击杀的能力，并且隐身时拥有更快的移动速度！
需要将所有玩家击杀才能胜利。

ArsonistFullDesc.0:
Can douse players with oil and later ignite to kill all doused targets at once, ignoring all forms of protection.
Has a longer targeting range than most other roles.
Depending on settings, may have the ignite CD removed after meetings if the Arsonist is the only remaining killer role.
ArsonistFullDesc.13:
可以给玩家涂油，随时可以在已涂油的目标附近点火。
点火时会同时击杀所有已涂了油的玩家！（无视各种保护强制击杀）
另外，纵火狂的技能选中距离会比其他玩家更长。

根据设置，在仅剩纵火狂一名杀手玩家时可以在会议结束后移除点火的冷却。

WerewolfFullDesc.0:
Can activate a rampage mode which lasts a certain duration.
While in rampage mode, kill CD is reduced to 3 seconds and the Werewolf has night vision.
WerewolfFullDesc.13:
月下狼人可以使用技能进入一段时间的狂暴状态。
狂暴状态下，击杀CD为3秒。

ThiefFullDesc.0:
Can kill any killer role and steal that role. Kills themselves instead if the target is not a kiler role.
Sidekicks can also be stolen.
In Guesser mode, can also guess players with killer roles to acquire their identity.
ThiefFullDesc.13:
身份窃贼可以击杀任何带刀职业，并夺取他们的职业。包括跟班、巴甫洛夫等。
如果目标并非带刀职业则会自杀。
在赌怪模式中，身份窃贼可以通过猜测带刀的玩家获得身份

JuggernautFullDesc.0: Each successful kill reduces the kill CD by 5 seconds, eventually reaching zero.
JuggernautFullDesc.13:
每次击杀会让自己的击杀cd减少5秒，
直到最后击杀cd会减少至0

PelicanFullDesc.0:
Can swallow players during the action phase, leaving no body behind.
If the Pelican is killed or recruited before a meeting starts, the swallowed players emerge alive at the Pelican's location.

Special trait: the CD for the second and subsequent swallows in a round is shorter; resets after a meeting.
Swallowing still triggers standard on-death abilities.
PelicanFullDesc.13:
行动阶段鹈鹕可以吞噬玩家，如果在进入会议前被其他玩家击杀，
则该轮被吞噬的玩家会在鹈鹕位置复活。

特殊能力：鹈鹕每回合的第二次及之后的吞噬冷却会变短，进入会议后重置。
注：鹈鹕吃掉玩家时仍然会触发死亡事件。

DoomsayerFullDesc.0:
Can observe the roles of other players during the action phase. Results are shown in chat during the meeting.
Doomsayers must identify the correct role from the revealed options to guess and kill the target during the meeting.
Wrong guesses do not result in death but prevent further guesses for the duration of that meeting.
Successful guesses refresh the ability and allow consecutive guesses during the same meeting.
The Observe ability has two difficulty modes (set by host):

Target's role + random roles from the entire pool (hard)
Target's role + random roles from the current game (easy)

Wins immediately after three successful guesses (adjustable in settings).
DoomsayerFullDesc.13:
行动阶段可以揭示其他玩家，进入会议后可以在聊天栏查看揭示结果
末日预言家需要从揭示的职业中找出该玩家的正确职业，并在会议中刺杀。
刺杀失败不会导致自己死亡，但本次会议无法再次刺杀。
刺杀成功可以刷新能力，
可以继续在本轮会议中刺杀下一位玩家。

末日预言家的揭示技能有两种模式（难度），可由房主设置：
-从模组全部职业池中随机职业+目标职业（困难）
-从场上已有的职业池中随机职业+目标职业（简单）

末日预言家刺杀成功3次（可设置）后将直接获胜。

AkujoFullDesc.0:
Must recruit a True Love and a Backup within a time limit, or the Mesmer will die.
When a Mesmer recruits a lover (either True Love or Backup), the recruited player's previous lover will die due to the bond being broken.

Shares the same win condition as Lovers.
Depending on settings, True Love may:

No longer follow the original faction's win condition
Still win with Crewmates if originally from that faction

N.B.: The game cannot end while a Mesmer is alive, unless the Crewmates win by completing tasks.
AkujoFullDesc.13:
需要在限定时间内招募真爱与备胎，否则会自杀。

魅魔如果招募了恋人（无论真爱或备胎）都会改变恋人关系，
而恋人的另一方会因为恋人被夺而自杀。

魅魔的胜利条件与恋人一致，
真爱可设置为不跟随原有阵营获胜，
或可设置为真爱为船员时可跟随船员胜利

注：魅魔在场时无法结束游戏（除非任务胜利）

WitnessFullDesc.0:
Upon entering a meeting, the Witness learns the identity of the killer of the reported body.
Within the first 30 seconds (adjustable) of a meeting, the Witness can mark a player as the killer for all players.
After the meeting, points are awarded based on the outcome. A certain score is required to win independently.
1 point is earned under either of the two following conditions:

Marked player was not the killer but was voted out by others,
Or, the Marked player was the killer but was not voted out.
Depending on settings, points may also be granted if the marked player dies unexpectedly during the meeting.

Concept by: 尕丶天堂
WitnessFullDesc.13:
污点证人进入会议时会得知当前报告尸体的凶手
在会议开始的30秒内(可设置)需要选择向所有玩家标记凶手
会议结束后会根据以下条件加分，达成一定分数可以独自胜利。

加分条件有以下两种：
        标记的玩家不是凶手，但是被其他玩家驱逐
        标记的玩家是凶手，但是没有被驱逐
另外，根据设置，目标在会议中意外死亡也有可能会加分

职业创意来自：尕丶天堂

BandLeaderFullDesc.0:
Must recruit three band members. Recruitment does not affect roles or factions.
Before the band forms, member status is only partially visible.
At each meeting, the Band Leader learns if the band can be formed.
A valid band requires all three members to be from the same general faction (Crewmate, Imposter, or Neutral).
Before band formation, members can be removed at will outside meetings.
If the band never forms by the end of the game, the Band Leader cannot win.
Once formed, the band and its win condition become fixed (unless the Band Leader role no longer exists somehow).

Band win conditions:
Crewmate: Wins together if the Crewmates win
Imposter: The Band Leader gains a kill ability with a short CD and wins with the Imposters
Neutral: If any band member wins independently, the entire band wins together

Concept by: 尕丶天堂
BandLeaderFullDesc.13:
乐队主唱需要寻找三位乐队成员，招募不会影响玩家的职业与阵营。标记
在成立之前不会向队员完全显示。每次进入会议时会进行判断是否能成立乐队。
成立需要三位成员同属与一个类型（三位需同属与船员、红狼或中立）。

在乐队成立之前，乐队主唱可以在会议外踢出成员，且游戏结束时仍然未成立
乐队则无法胜利。乐队成立后固定胜利条件和成员，无法变更(除非主唱消失)

乐队成立后，乐队的胜利条件变更为：
船员阵营：船员胜利后乐队主唱跟随船员胜利
红狼阵营：乐队主唱会获得极短cd的击杀，红狼胜利后乐队主唱跟随胜利
中立阵营：如果乐队成员中有任何一人胜利，则全队独立获胜。

职业创意来自：尕丶天堂

SchrodingersCatFullDesc.0:
When killed, Schrödinger's Cat survives and joins the killer's faction.
Depending on settings, the following options may apply:

Cannot be guessed by Guesser roles
Gains a kill ability if not aligned with the Crewmates
May be killed multiple times and continue joining new factions
SchrodingersCatFullDesc.13:
薛定谔的猫被其他玩家击杀后，可以加入对方阵营。

以下职业功能将按照房间设置决定：

薛定谔的猫不允许被赌怪猜测；
非船员阵营的猫会获得击杀技能；
允许猫被击杀多次且加入对方阵营。

CrewmateFullDesc.0: An ordinary Crewmate, contributes to the total task progress but otherwise unassuming.

VigilanteFullDesc.0:
The Vigilante can guess another player's role during meetings. If the guess is correct, the target dies. If incorrect, the Vigilante dies instead.

N.B.: Vigilantes and Assassins will not appear in Guesser Mode (as Guesser roles are assigned separately).
VigilanteFullDesc.13:
侠客属于强力船员，具有会议上猜测别人职业的能力，猜对则对方死亡，
猜错了，侠客自己死亡。

注：赌怪模式中不会出现侠客与刺客

MayorFullDesc.0:
During meetings, the Mayor can reveal their identity by clicking the "Reveal" button, which also makes them immune to role guesses.

Once revealed, the Mayor receives 3 votes per meeting (subject to settings), but their vision is significantly reduced.

Depending on settings, the Mayor may also gain the ability to call meetings remotely.
MayorFullDesc.13:
市长属于强力职业，本模组市长模式由房主设置为准：

固定票数：
-在会议中固定有x票，
-如果房主开启了允许切换投票数量，则允许在1票或x票切换。

揭示模式：
-默认情况下只有1票，可以在会议中揭示(公开)自己的身份，从而获得x票。
-另外，揭示身份后，视野会大幅缩小。

存票模式：
-每次会议开始时都会获得一定的票数，可以在投票时投出对应的票。
-存下的票有上限，会议中可以一次性投出的票也有上限。
-注：投票后不允许更改自己的票数。

另外，根据房间设置，市长可能拥有远程开会的能力，但破坏期间无法使用。

ProsecutorFullDesc.0:
The Prosecutor can forcibly eject one player per game.
A new "Prosecute" button appears in the bottom-left corner during meetings.

When activated:
All other players' votes are voided. The Prosecutor casts the decisive vote.
Voting becomes anonymous and cannot be viewed by others.

Depending on settings: if a Crewmate (including Neutral benign roles) is exiled in the Prosecutor's trial, the Prosecutor dies.

N.B.: During a Prosecutor's trial, the Prosecutor must vote—skipping is disabled. If no vote is cast by the end of the meeting, the vote is void and the ability is preserved.
ProsecutorFullDesc.13:
检察官属于强力船员，可以强制驱逐一名玩家，每局游戏只能使用一次。
在会议中左下角中新增 “起诉” 按钮，
按下按钮后本次会议其他玩家的所有投票被无效，
并且强制匿名投票，无法被窥视。

按房间设置：如果驱逐了船员（包括善良中立）则检察官会自杀。

（注：在检察官的会议中: 检察官无法跳过，如果会议结束时仍然不投票则本次会议无效，“起诉” 技能保留）

PortalmakerFullDesc.0:
The Portalmaker can place two portals on the map.
Once both are set, anyone can use them and teleport between the two.
The Portalmaker receives a log of players who used the gates, viewable upon entering a meeting.

Depending on settings, the Portalmaker may also teleport at will using their own gates.
The portal log can be viewed in the meeting chat.
PortalmakerFullDesc.13:
星门缔造者可以在地图上放置两道传送装置，
传送装置完成后，所有人都可以通过传送装置进行传送。
其他玩家乘坐星门时，星门缔造者进入会议后可以收到星门日志。

根据房间设置：星门缔造者可以随时随地使用自己的星门传送。
会议中可在聊天框查看星门日志

EngineerFullDesc.0:
The Engineer can vent and remotely fix sabotages with a single button.
Depending on room settings, Imposters/Jackals can see when the Engineer is in the vents, as indicated by all vents showing a blue outline.
EngineerFullDesc.13:
工程师拥有使用通风管道的能力，也能远程一键修复破坏。
根据房间设置：红/蓝 狼可以得知工程师是否在管道内，即全场管道冒蓝光。

PrivateInvestigatorFullDesc.0:
During the action phase, the Investigator can observe a target.
If the target is interacted with by another player, the Investigator receives a visual flash notification.
PrivateInvestigatorFullDesc.13:
行动阶段可以对一个目标观察，如果对方被其他玩家交互，
则观察者会收到闪光提示

SheriffFullDesc.0:
The Sheriff is the only Crewmate role with the ability to kill actively.
Their job is to eliminate Imposters and evil and killing Neutrals like the Jackal.
However, if the Sheriff attempts to kill a Crewmate, they will die instead.
SheriffFullDesc.13:
警长属于强力船员，是船员阵营唯一可以主动刀人的职业。
他的工作是杀死红狼，干翻豺狼等中立坏蛋。
但是警长出刀需谨慎，因为试图击杀船员的话，会使自己死亡。

DeputyFullDesc.0:
The Deputy serves under the Sheriff and starts with a handcuff ability.
Before being promoted to Sheriff, the Deputy can handcuff a target.
Handcuffs temporarily disable the target's kill, report and other abilities when they attept to use them.
If the Sheriff dies, the Deputy is promoted and becomes the new Sheriff.
DeputyFullDesc.13:
捕快属于强力船员，是警长的下属，在未成为警长前拥有手铐技能。
捕快可以对目标上拷，使被拷人的技能、击杀、
报警按钮在被点击的时候封锁几秒。
警长死亡后，捕快可以晋升为警长

BodyGuardFullDesc.0:
The Bodyguard can protect one player.
If someone attempts to kill the protected player, the Bodyguard will die in their place and also take out the killer.
Depending on settings, all players may see a brown flash when the protection is triggered.
BodyGuardFullDesc.13:
保镖可以保护一名对象。
当被保护对象被刀时会被保镖保护，而保镖和凶手会同时死亡。
根据房间设置，触发保镖保护的时候全场会闪棕色的光。

JumperFullDesc.0:
The Jumper can mark a location on the map and teleport back to it at any time.
The marked spot can be updated freely.
The number of uses is limited based on settings.
JumperFullDesc.13:
传送师可以标记一个地方，之后可以随时点击传送回到标记点。
传送师也可以随时更改标记点。
传送有次数限制，以房间设置为准。

DetectiveFullDesc.0:
The Detective can see player footprints along with their corresponding colors.
Additionally, when reporting a body, the Detective receives an autopsy report in the chat:
If the body is reported shortly after death, the killer's role is revealed.
If reported within a longer time window, the killer's faction is revealed.
DetectiveFullDesc.13:
侦探可以看到脚印和对应的颜色。
此外，侦探报警可以在聊天框获得尸检报告，
在尸体死亡极短时间内报警可以知道凶手职业，
在尸体死亡的一段时间内报警可得知凶手具体阵营。

TimeMasterFullDesc.0:
The Time Master has a Time Shield.
When activated, it grants temporary protection: if the Time Master is attacked, they survive and time rewinds a few seconds.
Time rewind does not revive players who are already dead.
TimeMasterFullDesc.13:
时间之主拥有时光之盾，
开启后受到击杀将免疫死亡并使时光回溯几秒钟。
时间回溯并不能复活已死之人。

VeteranFullDesc.0:
The Veteran can go on alert by activating their ability.
While on alert, any player attempting to interact with them,
whether by killing, recruiting, tracking, shielding, handcuffing, igniting, etc.,
will be instantly countered and killed instead.
VeteranFullDesc.13:
老兵属于强力船员，可以使用技能进入警戒状态，
当他们处于警戒状态时，所有与之交互
（包括击杀、招募、追踪、套盾、纵火、上拷等交互技能）
玩家都将被反弹死。

MedicFullDesc.0:
The Medic can place a shield on another player, making them immune to kills.
When reporting a body, the Medic receives an autopsy report:
If the body is reported shortly after death, the killer's name is revealed.
If reported within a longer time window, the killer's color type (lighter/darker) is revealed.
MedicFullDesc.13:
法医可以给目标套盾，被套盾的人无法被击杀。
此外，法医报警可以获得尸检报告，
在尸体死亡极短时间内报警可以知道凶手名称，
在尸体死亡的一段时间内报警可得知凶手颜色深浅。

SwapperFullDesc.0:
The Swapper can exchange the vote counts of two players during a meeting.
Additional swaps can be earned by completing tasks.
SwapperFullDesc.13:
换票师属于强力船员，可以在会议期间交换两名玩家身上的票数。
更多的换票次数可以通过做任务获得。

SeerFullDesc.0:
The Seer can sense death.
When any player dies, the Seer's screen will flash.
Depending on settings, the Seer may also be able to see a spirit at the location of death.
SeerFullDesc.13:
灵媒可以感知死亡，有玩家死亡时，屏幕会闪光。
此外，根据房间设置，灵媒可以看见死亡位置的魂

HackerFullDesc.0:
The Hacker can remotely access Vitals and Admin Table.
When using the hack ability:
Admin Table displays player colors and Vitals show exact times of death.
The Hacker cannot move while using abilities.
HackerFullDesc.13:
黑客可以远程使用生命检测议和管理室地图，
使用黑入技能后，管理室地图可显示颜色，
生命检测仪能显示具体死亡时间。
技能使用期间，黑客无法移动。

TrackerFullDesc.0:
When activated, the Tracker's ability show arrows toward corpses for a short time.
Additionally, the Tracker can place a tracker on a player, making an arrow permanently point to the location of the tracked player.
TrackerFullDesc.13:
追踪者开启技能后一段时间，会有箭头指向尸体，
时间结束后，箭头消失。
此外，追踪者还可以对一名玩家插入追踪器，
屏幕上将始终有一个箭头指向被跟踪人。

SnitchFullDesc.0:
After completing all tasks, the Snitch see arrows pointing to all players with evil roles in the game.
When only one task remains, evil players will be notified and receive an arrow pointing to the Snitch.
N.B.: Once revealed, the Snitch cannot be killed by Guessers.
Optionally, evil players and their exact roles can be shown during meetings based on settings.
SnitchFullDesc.13:
告密者做完所有任务后，可以知晓场上所有邪恶阵营的方向。
当告密者仅剩最后一个任务时将向被揭示的玩家发出警告，
被揭示玩家将有箭头持续指向告密者。
注：告密者被发现时无法被猜测死亡。
可选是否在会议中查看邪恶阵营玩家与详细职业。

SpyFullDesc.0:
From the Imposters' perspective, the Spy appears as a buddy Imposter and shows a red name just like other Imposters.
If a Spy is present in the game, Imposters are able to kill each other.
SpyFullDesc.13:
在红狼视野中，卧底名字和红狼队友一样显示为红色。
当一局游戏存在卧底时，红狼可以击杀队友。

SecurityGuardFullDesc.0:
The Security Guard can seal off vents and set up cameras.
These become active after the next meeting ends.
All players can see these devices once placed.
Completing tasks increases the number of uses available.
SecurityGuardFullDesc.13:
保安可以封锁通风管道，和放置监控。
在下轮会议结束后生效，
且所有人都能看见封锁装置和监控装置。
做任务能够提升保安使用技能的次数。

MediumFullDesc.0:
After a meeting ends, the Medium can commune with the spirit of a player who died in the previous round by visiting the location of their death.
In the following meeting, relevant information about the deceased will appear in the chatbox, with a chance of revealing additional details.
MediumFullDesc.13:
会议结束后，可以在上轮死亡玩家的死亡地点，对灵魂通灵。
进入会议后从对话框中得到死者相关信息。
有一定概率会获得额外信息。

TrapperFullDesc.0:
The Trapper can place traps on the map.
If two players trigger the same trap, their role, faction, or name (based on settings) will be revealed in the next meeting's chat.
When a trap is triggered, the Trapper receives an arrow pointing to the activated trap.
TrapperFullDesc.13:
设陷师可以在地图上放置陷阱，
当有两名玩家都踩中陷阱时，
进入会议后对话框将显示他们的 ( 职业/阵营/名称 ) 。
当有人踩中夹子时，陷阱师会有箭头指向被踩的夹子。

ProphetFullDesc.0:
During the action phase, the Prophet can reveal a player's faction.
A green name indicates a good role, while a red name signals an evil role or a crewmate killing role, like Sheriff or Veteran (based on settings).
The host can configure whether Crewmates killing, Neutral benign, Neutral evil, or Neutral killing roles are considered red.
ProphetFullDesc.13:
可以在行动阶段揭示玩家的阵营，绿名则代表善良，
红名则代表邪恶或者为带刀船员（可设置）。
房主可调整 击杀型船员、善良中立、邪恶中立、杀手中立 是否为红名。

InfoSleuthFullDesc.0:
The Informant can select a target by voting for them in a meeting.
At the start of the next meeting, they will receive information about that player's faction.
InfoSleuthFullDesc.13:
在会议中投票给查验目标，
下一轮会议开始时即可获得投票目标的阵营信息。

BalancerFullDesc.0:
During a meeting, the Arbiter can select two players to place on a scale. All players may vote only between those two.

A tie between the two will result in both being ejected.

If one of the two dies before voting ends (e.g., killed by a Guesser), the other is automatically ejected, and the vote is skipped.
BalancerFullDesc.13:
可以在会议中选择两位玩家挂上天平，所有玩家只能在这两位玩家中投票。

在特殊会议中，如果平票则同时驱逐两位玩家。

如果其中一位玩家死亡（例如被赌死），则直接跳过投票环节直接驱逐另一位被挂上天平的玩家。可以在会议中选择两位玩家挂上天平，所有玩家只能在这两位玩家中投票。

在特殊会议中，如果平票则同时驱逐两位玩家。

如果其中一位玩家死亡（例如被赌死），则直接跳过投票环节直接驱逐另一位被挂上天平的玩家。

RedemptorFullDesc.0:
The Priest can find and revive dead players. When a revival is in progress, all evil players are notified of the location.
After revival, evil players will receive an arrow pointing to the revived player.

The Redemptor has three abilities (the first two can be disabled by the host):
Divine: Randomly points to a corpse on the map. If none exist, no arrow appears.
Resurrect: Must be used next to a body. Takes time to complete, during which all evil players are alerted to the Priest's location. If interrupted, the revival fails. Usable once per round.
Sacrifice: Must also be used next to a body. The Priest sacrifices themselves, and after a short delay, the dead player is revived. If a meeting begins during this process, the revival fails.
RedemptorFullDesc.13:
牧师可以寻找尸体并复活该玩家，且复活时会向所有坏人通知复活位置。
该玩家复活后，所有坏人会有箭头指向该玩家。

牧师拥有三个技能（房主可以禁用前两个技能）：
启示：使用后会随机指向场上的一个尸体，没有尸体则没有箭头。

祈祷：需要在尸体旁使用，祈祷需要持续一定的时间，且会向所有坏人
通知牧师的位置，祈祷完成后会将该尸体所属的玩家复活。
如果祈祷被打断则复活失败！每回合只能使用一次。

殉道：需要在尸体旁使用：使用技能后会自杀，技能持续时间(一般很短)
结束后完成后会将该尸体所属的玩家复活。
复活过程中如果进入会议则复活失败！

LoverFullDesc.0:
If one of the Lovers is killed, the other dies as well.
If one of the Lovers is not a Crewmate and both remain alive, their task progress will not be counted.

When only 3 players remain and 2 of them are Lovers, the Lovers win by themselves immediately.
LoverFullDesc.13:
执子之手，与子共生。
恋人如果有任何一方被击杀，另一方也会一起死亡。
当恋人中有一方并非船员时并且恋人存活，
则不会计算该玩家的任务进度。

剩余3名玩家时并且两名玩家为恋人时，
恋人将直接独自获胜。

AssassinFullDesc.0:
Impostor Modifier
The Assassin grants Impostors the ability to guess other players' roles during meetings.
All Assassins share a common usage pool of guesses.

N.B.: Vigilantes and Assassins will not appear in Guesser Mode (as Guesser roles are assigned separately).
AssassinFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：伪装者
刺客使红狼具有会议上猜测别人职业的能力。
所有刺客拥有共享的猜测次数。

注：赌怪模式中不会出现侠客与刺客

DisperserFullDesc.0:
Imposter Modifier

The Disperser can scramble all players' locations instantly.
DisperserFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：伪装者

分散者可以打乱当前所有玩家位置。

SpecoalityFullDesc.0:
Imposter Modifier (Guesser)

Allows one incorrect role guess. If a guess is wrong, that target cannot be guessed again during the current meeting.
SpecoalityFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：伪装者（赌怪）

可以猜错一次职业，对目标猜测错误后，本次会议无法再次猜测该玩家。

LastImpostorFullDesc.0:
Imposter Modifier

When only one Impostor remains, their kill cooldown is reduced.
Does not affect Bounty Hunters and Gamblers.
LastImpostorFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：伪装者

仅剩余一名伪装者时，击杀冷却减少
（目前赏金猎人与赌徒无法无效）

VortoxFullDesc.0:
Imposter Modifier

As long as the Vortex is alive, certain investigative roles will receive reversed or distorted results.
Autopsy reports may show incorrect time of death.
Depending on settings, if a certain number of meetings are skipped while Vortex is alive, the Impostor team wins instantly.

N.B.: Vortox cannot disrupt players protected by the Medic.

Currently affected roles include: Prophet, Informant, Trapper, and autopsy-related roles like Medic and Detective.
VortoxFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：伪装者

存活时会干扰部分信息类船员职业，查验结果会被反转，
尸检报告的死亡时间也会受到一定的干扰。
另外根据设置，存活时如果会议累计跳过n次红狼方可直接获胜。

注：干扰对被法医保护的玩家不生效。

目前的干扰会影响的职业有：预言家、情报师、设陷师，
尸检类职业：法医、侦探。

BloodyFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

The Bloody's killer leaves a trail of blood in your color for a short time.
BloodyFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

被击杀后，凶手会在地上留下血迹

AntiTeleportFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

The Anchor cannot be moved by meetings, and disperse abilities.
AntiTeleportFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

会议及分散后，通讯兵会回到会议前和分散前的位置。

TieBreakerFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

If any vote is a draw, the Tiebreaker's vote will go through.
TieBreakerFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

破平者的投票时，票数计为1.5票

BaitFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier (can be set to Crewmate-only Modifier)

Killing the Bait makes the killer immediately auto self-report.
BaitFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家（可设置为仅船员）

被击杀后凶手自动报警

AftermathFullDesc.0:
Non-Imposter Modifier

Killing the Aftermath forces their killer to use their ability (if they have one and it's not in use).
If the ability requires a target, it will be the killer themselves.
AftermathFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：中立、船员阵营

被击杀后凶手会被动使用一次技能。
其中技能如果需要目标则为杀手自己。

例如：
勒索者击杀余波后会自动勒索自己，
清理者击杀余波会自动清理余波的尸体等。

SunglassesFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

视野会变小

TorchFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Modifier

Vision is better and doesn't get reduced when the lights are sabotaged.
TorchFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

熄灯时视野不变，并且视野较大。

FlashFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Moves at a faster speed.
FlashFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

移速变得更快

MultitaskerFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Modifier

Task UIs are transparent.
MultitaskerFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

任务界面透明

GiantFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Size is gigantic and moving speed is decreased.
GiantFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

体型更大，移速更“慢”

MiniFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Cannot be killed before turning 18, but the Mini's kill CD (if they have a kill ability) is doubled.
After turning 18, can be killed and the Mini's kill CD is greatly reduced.
If the Mini is ejected and was a Crewmate, the game ends in failure for all players.
MiniFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

18岁之前不可被击杀，但击杀CD双倍。
18岁后可被击杀且击杀CD变短。

此外，小孩被驱逐时，如果小孩为船员则结束游戏（所有玩家失败）

VipFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

When the VIP dies, all players see a screen flash.
If enabled in settings, flash color indicates the VIP's faction:
White = Crewmate, Blue = Neutral, Red = Impostor.
VipFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

VIP死亡时，所有人都会接收到闪光。
如果房间设置闪光可显示阵营颜色，
则白色闪光代表死者为船员，蓝色代表中立，红色代表红狼。

IndomitableFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Immune to being guessed during meetings.
IndomitableFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

不屈者会议上不会因为猜测而死亡。

SluethFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Reporting bodies reveals the role of the player being reported.
SluethFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

报警时可以获取所报尸体的职业信息

CursedFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Modifier

When killed by an Impostor, immediately joins the Impostor faction and loses their original role.
CursedFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

被红狼击杀时会立即加入红狼阵营，且失去原有的职业。

（在加入红狼阵营之前还是正常船员，请不要乱来口牙！）

InvertFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Movement controls are reversed. Effect wears off after a few meetings (sober up).
InvertFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

移动方向相反，过几次会议后即可醒酒

BlindFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Cannot report bodies.
BlindFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

胆小鬼无法报告尸体。

WatcherFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Always has an arrow pointing to the nearest player.
WatcherFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

会议结束时可以看到具体投票情况。

RadarFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Always has an arrow pointing to the nearest player.
RadarFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

始终有箭头指向离你最近的人

TunnelerFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Modifier

Gains the ability to vent after completing all tasks.
TunnelerFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

做完所有任务后获得使用通风管道的能力

ButtonBarryFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Has the ability to call a meeting from anywhere on the map, even during sabotages.
ButtonBarryFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

拥有一次远程召开会议的能力

ChameleonFullDesc.0:
All Faction Modifier

Becomes transparent when standing still for a short duration. Moving reveals the Chameleon again.
ChameleonFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：全部玩家

站在原地不动可以逐渐变色隐身，移动后会解除隐身状态。

ShifterFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Modifier (can be set to Neutral Shifter)

Can swap main roles with another player during the action phase.
A yellow text prompt will appear under the the name tag, and the swap takes effect after a meeting.
If the target is not a Crewmate (toggleable), the Shifter will die after the meeting ends.
(This modifier is lost after a successful swap.)
Tip: The Shifter’s goal is usually to inherit a powerful Crewmate role: for example, to swap with a Sheriff before they die.

N.B.: The swap will still take effect even if the target dies.
ShifterFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员（可设置为中立交换师）

可以在行动阶段与其他玩家交换主职业，交换时名字下方会有黄字提示，
会议结束后生效。
如果交换目标不是船员（可以设置），会议结束时会自杀。
（交换完毕后此附加能力消失）
提示：交换师的目的主要是为了继承船员强力职业，
例如在警长死亡前将身份交换。

注：玩家死亡不会影响交换效果。

GhostEngineerFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Ghost Role

After death, can remotely fix one sabotage.
GhostEngineerFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

在死后可以修复一次破坏

SpecterFullDesc.0:
Independent Neutral Ghost Role (unavailable for Jackal, Pavlov and Lawyer)

On the next round after death, the Specter may revive by finding another corpse and inheriting its main role.
Keeps their own modifier ability. Cannot revive using their own body.

N.B.: Reviving consumes the body.
SpecterFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：无阵营中立（豺狼、巴甫洛夫 以及 律师 无法获得）

死亡后的下一回合可以重新寻找尸体复活，获得该玩家的主职业。
保留自身的附加能力。不能使用自己的的尸体复活
注：复活时会消耗一具该玩家的尸体。

PoltergeistFullDesc.0:
Crewmate Modifier

Crewmates have a chance to become a Poltergeist after death. Poltergeists can move a nearby corpse to their current location.
Default range: 0.75× normal report radius.
PoltergeistFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：船员

死亡后有概率成为捣蛋鬼。捣蛋鬼可以移动附近的某一具尸体到自己脚下。
默认范围 x 0.75 (1倍为正常报告范围)

InfectedFullDesc.0:
When Infected uses Kill on another player, if said player is a killer role, they will be killed directly; if the target is a Crewmate or a non-killer role, they will be converted into an Infected.

N.B.: There is a limit to the number of Infecteds in total and to the number of Infecteds simultaneously alive.
If the number of Infecteds reaches the limit, using Kill will simply kill the target.
InfectedFullDesc.13:
感染者击杀玩家时，如果对方为击杀相关职业会直接击杀对方，如果对方为
船员或非击杀相关职业则会将目标变为感染者。

感染者有最大数量和同时存在数量的限制，请注意！
如果感染者数量达到最大时，使用击杀技能时都会击杀对方。

JailorFullDesc.0:
The Jailor can choose a player to Jail during the action phase, taking effect once the next meeting starts.

Messages sent by the jailed player during the meeting will only be visible to the Jailor; other players cannot see them.
The Jailor can PM the jailed player using the [/jail text] command.

The Jailor can execute the jailed player during the meeting, but if they execute a Crewmate, they will permanently lose their ability.
JailorFullDesc.13:
你可以在行动阶段选择一位玩家监禁，进入会议后会将目标玩家监禁。

目标在会议中发送的消息只会被典狱长接收，其他玩家无法看到，
但典狱长可以使用 [/jail text] 指令与被监禁者私聊。

典狱长可以在会议中处决被监禁玩家，但如果处决了船员，将永久失去技能。

MarionetteFullDesc.13:
木偶师可以放置一个木偶，木偶的可见性由房主设置。

按左边的shift键可以切换功能键
在木偶有效时间内，
木偶师可以随时查看木偶的周围情况，并可以交换自己与木偶的位置。

AvengerFullDesc.13:
两位恋人中如果其中一位恋人被其它玩家击杀时，另一位有概率会变为复仇者。
变为复仇者之后需要为恋人复仇后才能带死去的恋人胜利！
如果复仇期间目标死亡时，复仇者可能会自杀或者变为 ( 小丑 | 失忆者 | 幸存者 )

ClogFullDesc.13:
分配阵营：伪装者

可以放置鬼魂阻挠船员行进，障碍物会持续一段时间后消失。

ProfessionalFullDesc.13:
击杀玩家时不会留下尸体，但是船员经过尸体位置时会自动报警。

注：附加能力的专业杀手与主职业的专业杀手冲突，
当附加能力的专业杀手开启时，自动禁用主职业的专业杀手

OracleFullDesc.13:
会议外选定一位信徒，每次进会议时都会获得邪恶阵营的信息。
神谕者会在会议中保护信徒，使其不会在会议中被驱逐。
神谕者死亡后会揭示信徒的阵营，有概率是错误的。（设置）

SoulSightFullDesc.13:
窥天者可以自杀窥探天意一段时间，持续时间结束后会自动复活。
在以死亡状态进入会议时得1分，得x分可以跟随场上阵营获胜。

如果尸体被吃掉则无法复活和得分。
